task: Take the white wedge out of the bowl and put it on the nearest front corner of the counter.
raw:
Scene: white_wedge, bowl, orange_cloth, green_spatula, table
Step 1: reach(white_wedge)
  affordance_region: the white wedge in the bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_wedge, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_wedge) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_wedge)
  affordance_region: the handle of the white wedge
  contact: holding(white_wedge) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_wedge)
Step 3: transport(white_wedge -> front_corner)
  affordance_region: the front corner of the wooden table
  spatial: above(white_wedge, front_corner, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_wedge)
  done_when: above(white_wedge, front_corner, 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_wedge -> front_corner)
  affordance_region: the front corner of the wooden table
  contact: surface_contact(white_wedge, front_corner) [completion]; released(white_wedge) [completion]
  pose: stable(white_wedge) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_wedge, front_corner) AND released(white_wedge) AND stable(white_wedge)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the white wedge in the bowl
the handle of the white wedge
the front corner of the wooden table
the front corner of the wooden table
steps.done_when: surface_contact(white_wedge, front_corner) AND released(white_wedge) AND stable(white_wedge)
